title: Lifecycle Hooks
description: Implement ngOnInit and ngOnDestroy to initialize data and clean up a timer in an Angular component.
checklist: Import Component, OnInit, and OnDestroy from @angular/core
Create a message property and timerId property
Set message in ngOnInit and start a timer
Render the message in the template

hints.guide: Import Component, OnInit, and OnDestroy from @angular/core
Implement the component class with lifecycle interfaces
Set initial state in ngOnInit and start a repeating timer
Clean up the timer in ngOnDestroy
Render the current message using interpolation
